text:
(3) Angel funds shall accept, up to a maximum period of 101[five] years, an investment of not less
than twenty five lakh rupees from an angel investor.
sentence_window:
(1) Angel funds shall only raise funds by way of issue of units to angel investors. (2) An angel fund shall have a corpus of at least 100[five] crore rupees. (3) Angel funds shall accept, up to a maximum period of 101[five] years, an investment of not less
than twenty five lakh rupees from an angel investor. (4) Angel fund shall raise funds through private placement by issue of information memorandum
or placement memorandum, by whatever name called. 102[Provided that the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 shall apply to the Angel Fund, if
it is formed as a company.]
100 Substituted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds)(Amendment)
Regulations, 2018, w.e.f.
